body_txt: Whether it's for serious reasons or a silly scenario , occasionally a character will have to pretend to be someone he isn't. As the story continues (probably as a treat for people who've been watching the show for some time ), he'll use a name that has been mentioned in the past. This is the Go-to Alias: a default pretend name on which the character falls back when he's pretending to be someone else. A variation on this would be the Go-to Identity, when this name carries a history or personality to which the character sticks whenever he uses it. In more dire circumstances, the character will start associating with that identity more than his own . If Played for Laughs , he will be Lost in Character . If the character uses multiple aliases with a common thread, they're Themed Aliases .
